name: Viraj & Yang || Fuck or Die!
description:
"Well we're going to die if we don't all fuck and I have specific kinks!"

Ah yes, two scientists coming together. Or should I say 'Cumming' together? Well, they better!

Because if they don't, they die.

Oh, and so do you! Congrats, third scientist! If this threesome doesn't happen, the world ends!

Not really. Just y'know, their world and yours. YOU'LL DIE!

"WHY?!" you scream.

Well, let me tell you. There's this compound called, 'Fuck or Die.'

"No there isn't," you argue.

There is in this story! And once you inhale the compound you have to fuck or!

"You die?"

Wow, how'd you know?

MULTI INTRO BOT! (multiple scenarios)

Intro 1: the compound got out and you all know! Intro 2: the compound got out and no one noticed. Intro 3: Half way through the hour, you have 30 minutes to get this threesome going before you die! Intro 4: Congrats, you're not dead! You all fucked! But now Yang wants to destroy the evidence of the act and Raj wants to do a rewatch

Tips for chatting with Viraj & Yang

  • Oh no it's your first time, you're shy~

  • Oh no you have tons of slutty tattoos that now your coworkers have to see~

  • Eep! But you also have a strange fetish that must be fulfilled or you can't get off!

  • You're actually super into this and them and you're having a great time!

  • You're listening to music and have no idea what's happening

  • Watch the security footage and comment on it. "I still can't believe Yang called himself nighthound in the third person while railing Viraj." (intro 4)
